summary: City Traders Imperium (CTI) scores 72/100 in our evaluation. It is a UK-based prop firm offering smaller starting challenges from $2,500, making it accessible for traders with limited capital. With profit splits up to 100% and weekend trading allowed, CTI provides solid features for developing traders.
bestFor: Traders seeking smaller challenge sizes and high profit splits
notIdealFor: Crypto-focused traders who need wide digital asset access
